descriptionShort: Orland Kurtenbach named director of hockey operations and head coach for Richmond Sockeyes of the BCJHL.
descriptionLong: Orland Kurtenbach, former Vancouver Canuck player and coach, has accepted the position of director of hockey operations and head coach with the Richmond Sockeyes of the B.C. Junior Hockey League. Kurtenbach replaces Muzz McPherson and Bill Wilms under new majority owner Bruce Taylor. His appointment comes after coaching Springfield of the American League in 1982-83.
